Configuration for https://penguinmod.com/
You can move, resize, and minimize this comment, but don't edit it by hand. This comment can be deleted to remove the stored settings.

STRING: Keys and what they do: 1: Break Cursor. 2: Fling It ALL! 3: Clear notifications. Space: SEND notification! CTRL: Open Start/Windows key.
